name: yog
description: 研发业务知识库插件，用 docs/knowledge 维护业务上下文、能力、证据和 ADR。

interface.shortDescription: Build and query product Wiki and coding-agent Knowledge.
interface.longDescription: Yog builds and queries a product Wiki under docs/wiki and coding-agent business knowledge under docs/knowledge, with separate read and write skill boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Use yog:knowledge to build or maintain coding-agent business knowledge.
Use yog:wiki to generate a product Wiki, or yog:wiki-review to decide one atomic ReviewItem.
Use yog:knowledge-query for engineering questions from docs/knowledge, or yog:wiki-query for product questions from docs/wiki.
